type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Increased natural gas combustion of 35% in 2009.  Net production also increased by 27%.  Resulting increases from previous year for: NOx was 32.5%, for PM10/PM2.5 was 37.5%, for VOC was 37%.
